parameters.query: insert into monitor_runs (mode, status) values ('{{$env.DEALS_MONITOR_MODE || "MODE_A"}}', 'running') returning id, mode, run_started_at;

select coalesce((select summary_text from reports order by report_date desc limit 1), '') as prev_report,
       coalesce(json_agg(json_build_object(
         'id', id,
         'service', service,
         'source', source,
         'source_url', source_url,
         'title', title,
         'deal_type', deal_type,
         'price_before', price_before,
         'price_now', price_now,
         'discount_text', discount_text,
         'score', score,
         'status', status,
         'content_hash', content_hash,
         'last_seen_at', last_seen_at
       )) filter (where status = 'active'), '[]'::json) as active_deals
from deals;

with ranked_deals as (
  select
    '{{$json.run_id}}'::uuid as run_id,
    jsonb_array_elements('{{$json.top_deals_json}}'::jsonb) as item
), upserted as (
  insert into deals (
    service, source, source_url, title, deal_type, price_before, price_now,
    discount_text, score, status, content_hash, last_run_id, first_seen_at, last_seen_at
  )
  select
    item->>'service',
    'llm_analysis',
    item->>'source_url',
    item->>'title',
    item->>'deal_type',
    item->>'price_before',
    item->>'price_now',
    item->>'discount_text',
    coalesce((item->>'score')::int, 0),
    'active',
    item->>'content_hash',
    run_id,
    now(),
    now()
  from ranked_deals
  on conflict (content_hash)
  do update set
    title = excluded.title,
    price_before = excluded.price_before,
    price_now = excluded.price_now,
    discount_text = excluded.discount_text,
    score = excluded.score,
    status = 'active',
    last_run_id = excluded.last_run_id,
    last_seen_at = now()
  returning id, content_hash
)
insert into deal_events (deal_id, run_id, event_type, payload)
select u.id, '{{$json.run_id}}'::uuid, 'observed', jsonb_build_object('content_hash', u.content_hash)
from upserted u;

update deals
set status = 'expired', expired_at = now(), last_run_id = '{{$json.run_id}}'::uuid
where status = 'active'
  and content_hash in (
    select item->>'content_hash'
    from jsonb_array_elements('{{$json.expired_json}}'::jsonb) item
  );
